subcodes.first_line: The sun proclaimeth, “The All-Bountiful is come!”, and the moon circleth round the Most Sublime Vision. Were man to incline his inner ear
subcodes.first_line_orig: آفتاب بقد اتی الوهات ناطق و قمر حول منظر اکبر طائف اگر انسان بسمع فوءاد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity
